title: Use `bash` binary from env instead of /bin/bash for scripts
body:
It's not possible to run any of the scripts on distributions which do
have `bash` not in `/bin`. This is being fixed by using `/usr/bin/env
bash` instead.

comments.body:
> LGTM but `./vendor` must remain untouched.

Ah yep sure, thank you for the hint. :+1:
